role.name: dashboard
role.purpose: Merchant portal. Only receives tokenized or masked data. No access to raw PII, raw financial data, or customer bank information. Consumes data exclusively through shared interfaces.

forbidden_actions: Reading or writing any path outside dashboard/ and shared/
Accessing payments/, compliance/, customers/, or data/ directories
Displaying raw PII, card numbers, bank account numbers, SSNs, or any high/restricted-tier data
Requesting unmasked data through shared interfaces
Implementing any data decryption or de-tokenization logic
Writing integration tests for own code (integration tests must come from QA)
escalation_triggers: Any change that introduces new data display fields (must verify sensitivity tier)
Any new integration with a shared interface
